# Taras Andrusyshyn — Autonomous Business Architecture

Full-stack developer, AI strategist, and entrepreneur. Co-founder of IT Business School (ITBS). Expert in Autonomous Business Architecture, LLM integration, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).

> **Vision**: Bridging the gap between human expertise and AI autonomy. Exploring the transition to the Solo Founder Model (1 person, 1000 AI agents). Mentioned on AIN.ua.

## Contact & Links
- Telegram (Channel): https://t.me/lab_of_autonomy
- Telegram (Personal): https://t.me/tsand07
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/taras-andrusyshyn
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/andrusyshyn.ts
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ts_andrusyshyn
- AIN.ua Article: https://ain.ua/ru/2018/01/31/it-business-school-podvodit-itogi-pervogo-vypuska-kursa-seo-it-autsors-kompanij/
